metadata.title: Why "copyright restrictions" can mean three completely different things
metadata.topic: Moderation opacity; diagnosing aliased error messages
metadata.purpose: Exposing which rule fired hands adversarial users a map to route around it. So the system emits one coarse "rejected" signal regardless of cause; legitimate users pay the diagnostic cost of systematic elimination.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro af_kore) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.exclusions: the specific rule set, trigger-word lists, provider moderation architecture
metadata.visual_object: A three-branch tree — brand node, verb node, detail node — all arrows collapsing into one red leaf labeled with the single error string.
metadata.hook: A generator returns "may be related to copyright restrictions" whether you used a brand name, an aggressive verb, or a disallowed detail — three different rules, one indistinguishable error.

beats.narration_text: A prompt fails on "copyright restrictions." Remove the brand name — still fails. Change the verb — still fails. Remove the last detail — passes. Three rules fired across three attempts; the error string never changed.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: The error should tell you what to fix; this case needed three blind eliminations with no feedback — why would a moderation system collapse distinct causes into one signal?
A generator returns "may be related to copyright restrictions" whether you used a brand name, an aggressive verb, or a disallowed detail — three different rules, one indistinguishable error.

Exposing which rule fired hands adversarial users a map to route around it. So the system emits one coarse "rejected" signal regardless of cause; legitimate users pay the diagnostic cost of systematic elimination.
beats.visual: A three-branch tree — brand node, verb node, detail node — all arrows collapsing into one red leaf labeled with the single error string.
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: Prompt with a brand name + aggressive verb + disallowed detail. One error. Remove brand → same error. Change verb → same error. Remove detail → passes. Three eliminations, one string throughout, no progress signal.

Exposing which rule fired hands adversarial users a map to route around it. So the system emits one coarse "rejected" signal regardless of cause; legitimate users pay the diagnostic cost of systematic elimination.
